rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §11.401 governs school district policies on social transitioning. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 11.401. SCHOOL DISTRICT POLICY: ASSISTANCE WITH SOCIAL TRANSITIONING PROHIBITED.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and this education code provision.
